displayTitle: The Bounty Hunter (Lost Jedi Adventure Game Book)
synopsis: The Bounty Hunter is a "choose your own adventure"–style roleplaying book, written by Paul Cockburn and published, in the United Kingdom only, by Boxtree in 1994. It was the second (and last) part of The Lost Jedi adventure game series. The story was later collected along with Jedi Dawn in The Lost Jedi Adventure Game Book.
title: The Bounty Hunter (Lost Jedi Adventure Game Book)
